creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
The distfile and WWW site is unavailable again:

root@portjail:/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/termit # distilator .
403 [DISTFILE]  http://cloud.github.com/downloads/nonstop/termit/termit-2.9.0.tar.bz2
501 [WWW]       http://wiki.github.com/nonstop/termit/

Could you please investigate?
